g.text: Entity Lifecycle State Machine (ECS Generation Tracking)

div.p: Illegal Transition: Dead → Alive (direct) Failure Mode: Reusing slot without gen increment.

ol.li: Data Race: Multiple owners of same index.

ul.li: Wraparound: Handled via modular arithmetic. "- Validation": " Handle.gen == Storage[index].gen."

div.p: Guarantees: No branching on entity state required for bulk system processing.
If a slot is recycled 2^32 times while a stale reference is held, the handle becomes valid again (ABA problem).
